title: sauropus androgynus
intro: Sauropus androgynus, also known as "killer tree" due to its toxic properties, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sauropus androgynus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood sugar levels, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The herbal preparations of Sauropus androgynus include infusions, decoctions, and capsules, although its use should be approached with caution due to its toxicity and potential side effects.
